title: YOUTHCORE - 211info
text: ANTFARM YOUTHCORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hands-on training program teaching basic employment skills such as landscaping, debris removal, land cleaing, invavis species and brush removal, junk hauling and more. All program participants become employees of the agency. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 668-7962 Main phone (503) 668-9955 Alternate Main phone (503) 668-7962 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97004, 97009 (Clackamas County only), 97011, 97013, 97015, 97017, 97022, 97023, 97028, 97038, 97042, 97045, 97049, 97055, and 97067 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - AXIS LEARNING CENTER FOOD - ANTFARM LEARNING GARDENS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITYCONNECT INFORMATION SERVICES - NUEVO FUTURO SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ANTFARM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANTFARM
